about.section-1: My name is Dora Duszin, I'm a full-stack freelance software developer with over 7 years of experience across diverse industries and technologies.
about.section-2: I'm based in Valencia, Spain - but have had the chance to cooperate with many international teams across Europe.
about.section-3: I was able to collaborate with clients ...
I was able to collaborate with clients ...
about.section-4: ... and beyond technical proficiency, gain substantial experience in collaborative agile environments, offering strong communication skills in multiple languages.
about.section-5: Explore my site to discover how we can collaborate and drive excellence together!

experience-services.section-1: Over the years I consistently delivered high-quality and reliable software for leading clients using the latest technologies.
experience-services.section-2: My expertise spans a wide range of programming languages and tools covering both front and backend development.
experience-services.section-3: Beyond technical proficiency I value creativity, teamwork and flexibility.
experience-services.section-4: I thrive in collaborative agile environments, offering strong communication skills in English, Spanish and Hungarian.

skills.frontend: TypeScript, JavaScript, Angular, React, Ionic, Node.js, PrimeNG, Angular Material, Bootstrap, DevExpress, HTML, CSS
skills.backend: Java, Kotlin, C#, Spring, Spring Boot, .Net, .Net Core, MongoDb, MSSQL, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Hibernate, Entity Framework, Maven, Gradle, Ant
skills.devops-other: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Bamboo, AWS, Azure, CloudFoundry, Elasticsearch, JUnit5, Jira, Confluence, Git, GitHub, Bitbucket

projects.description-1: For the past 4 years, I have been collaborating with devpoint GmbH, a distinguished Swiss agile software development company, reputable for its diverse clientele and projects.
projects.description-2: As a freelance contributor, I've had the privilege of working on 3 distinct projects across different sectors, actively engaging in delivering tailored solutions to meet the needs of each client.
projects.description-3: These experiences have enhanced my abilities to navigate and adapt to diverse project scopes, working with several different teams and technical approaches.
projects.description-4: For a comprehensive overview of my professional journey, please refer to my full employment and education history by clicking below.

project-1.title: Administration System and Webshop
project-1.description: Full-stack web development of an innovative administration system and webshop for a leading Swiss cable & satellite client providing IT- and cloud services, network, datacenter and internet.

summary.first: Webshop for ordering network, IT- and cloud service-related products, services, and bundles tailored for both residential and business users.
summary.second: Web-based administration platform utilized by the client's employees and dedicated admin users for managing internal processes, offers, and more.

tasks.first: Key member of the full-stack web development and testing team for an innovative administration system and webshop
tasks.second: Improving design, architecture and database construction while overseeing the entire software development lifecycle
tasks.third: Ensuring optimal functionality and seamless user experience to drive profitable sales

detailed-description.stack: Angular, TypeScript, PrimeNG, HTML, CSS, Java, Spring Boot, MongoDb, Maven, XML, SOAP, Docker, AWS, Jira, Confluence, Git, Bitbucket

project-2.title: Cloud Storage and Synchronization Service
project-2.description: Microservice development and migration of a cloud storage service for a prominent Swiss telecommunications and ICT service provider serving residential and business customers in Switzerland and Italy.

detailed-description.client: Swiss telecommunications and ICT service provider

summary.first: Cross-platform cloud storage and synchronization service with features like automatic backup, serving 5k+ monthly new users in Switzerland.
summary.second: Backend team member in an agile (SCRUM) environment.

tasks.first: Executed microservice development, migration and refactoring using the latest technologies
tasks.second: Collaborated with Android and iOS teams ensuring fast and secure file management across multiple devices
tasks.third: Facilitated efficient file processing for automatic backup and synchronization

detailed-description.stack: Java, Reactive Java, Kotlin, MongoDb, Spring Boot, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, CloudFoundry, Docker, AWS, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Grafana, Kibana, Upsource, Git

project-3.title: CAD Support and Administration System
project-3.description: Full-stack web development and enhancement of an administration platform for a proprietary CAD program developed by an international client based in Germany provisioning lightning and surge protection solutions.

detailed-description.client: International lightning and surge protection provider based in Germany

summary.first: Web-based administration and file management tool for supporting the proprietary CAD program of the client, providing general drawing and project management features, as well as a secure background for the client's webshop.

tasks.first: Full-stack development of the administration tool in an agile (SCRUM) team
tasks.second: Enhanced the existing system with nearly real-time communication through web sockets
tasks.third: Cooperated with the CAD team to plan and implement an improved file management services using Test Driven Development

detailed-description.stack: Angular, TypeScript, Angular Material, HTML, CSS, Java, Spring Boot, Azure, SQL, Maven, JUnit 5, SOAP, Web Sockets, Docker, Bamboo, Jira, Confluence, Git, GitHub, Bitbucket

contact.section-1: If you're interested in getting to know more about how we can collaborate, contact me below!

freelancing.title: Freelance Projects
freelancing.description: I started my freelancing career in 2019, initially undertaking smaller tasks to familiarize myself with this new professional landscape. Throughout that year, I engaged in various projects, refining my skill set in a range of technologies, including React, Node.js, C# and .Net Core.

summary-1.part-1: Developed a website for a Hungarian carpentry business client, utilizing
summary-1.part-2: React, Node.js/Express.js, MongoDB, Docker, HTML, and CSS.

summary-2.part-1: Implemented a web-based administrative platform for a Hungarian client's mobile application, aimed at connecting families with kids, using
summary-2.part-2: C#, Azure, .Net Core, MSSQL, JavaScript, CSS, HTML and Bootstrap.

summary-3.part-2: C#, Azure, .Net Core, MSSQL, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, and Bootstrap
summary-3.part-3: to support a Hungarian client's venture in developing a blockchain and cryptocurrency-based advertisement application.

blackbelt.name: BlackBelt Technology Ltd.
blackbelt.summary: BlackBelt Technology is one of Hungary's most dynamically growing software development companies offering rapid app development using their proprietary low-coding framework called Judo.

tasks.first: Developed Java backend solutions within Judo, contributing to the enhancement of the framework's functionalities
tasks.second: Collaborated in the software development of various corporate task management and reporting systems utilizing the Judo framework, ensuring the delivery of customized solutions
tasks.third: Received mentorship from a senior developer and worked closely with the frontend team, gaining valuable insights and guidance while actively contributing to the team's projects

blackbelt.stack: Java SE & EE, Maven, Spring, Judo, Docker, PostgreSQL, Hibernate

bcm.name: BCM Engineering Ltd.
bcm.summary: BCM Engineering Ltd. is a Hungarian company offering unique software development and IT Operation on the regional and international market, serving clients from small-scale companies to multinational corporations.

tasks.first: Collaborated with an experienced team to create new web applications using test-driven development methodologies
tasks.second: Full-stack development of corporate task management, administrative, and reporting systems, working closely with other cross-functional teams
tasks.third: Contributed to the maintenance and refactoring of already existing software for the financial, telecommunication, and electric industries

ge.name: GE Healthcare
ge.summary: GE Healthcare is a leading global provider of medical imaging, monitoring, biomanufacturing, and cell therapy technologies, collaborating with healthcare providers and partners worldwide to improve healthcare delivery and patient outcomes.

tasks.first: Backend development of a complex and innovative healthcare platform, focusing on refactoring legacy solutions to the latest technologies to ensure the delivery of high-quality software solutions
tasks.second: Supported the other development teams to design and implement advanced features and functionalities for medical imaging
tasks.third: Participated in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and sprint reviews to contribute to effective communication and task prioritization

ge.stack: Java, C++, Bash, Maven, Ant, Docker

balinternet.name: Bálinternet Ltd.
balinternet.summary: Bálinternet Ltd. is a Hungarian unique software and web development company, focusing mainly on providing reliable solutions tailored for city councils and other public institutions.

tasks.first: Full-stack development of web-based applications, internal use software, websites, and portals tailored specifically for the Council of Törökbálint and other urban institutions
tasks.second: Collaborated closely with stakeholders to identify requirements, design user-friendly interfaces and implement new functionalities for internal administration solutions
tasks.third: Integrated OpenCMS to efficiently manage content and ensure a solid background for dynamic features enhancing user experience

balinternet.stack: Java, Spring, PostgreSQL, Maven, OpenCMS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap

cloudess.name: Cloudess
cloudess.summary: I co-founded a non-profit organization called Cloudess with two friends I met during my time as a Microsoft Student Partner, aimed at empowering women pursuing careers in STEM fields. As a key motivation for starting my freelance career, I endeavored to integrate my personal brand with the organization's mission, which unfortunately ceased operations due to the challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic and my relocation abroad.
cloudess.summary-2: Despite this, I'm proud to have formed part of this experience, during our operational years we successfully built a supportive community, organized events and workshops at esteemed venues such as Accenture and Microsoft, participated in startup competitions and collaborated with various professionals in tech and social media sectors to amplify our message.

tasks.first: Provided the technological infrastructure as CTO and lead developer, overseeing the creation and maintenance of essential platforms such as the organization's website, forums, and event management systems
tasks.second: Played a pivotal role in the event planning and execution, leveraging technical expertise to provide the necessary tech background for workshops and seminars
tasks.third: Demonstrated leadership and mentorship by providing talks and presentations for younger audiences and fellow university students, inspiring and empowering the next generation of tech enthusiasts while actively building a supportive community

cloudess.stack: C#, .Net Core, Azure, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, Bootstrap

microsoft.name: Microsoft Hungary
microsoft.summary: I am proud to highlight my Student Partnership at Microsoft Hungary, a cherished chapter in my life, where I had the opportunity to be part of a global group of on-campus ambassadors as a member of the software development team.

tasks.first: Actively engaged with fellow students and faculties to promote Microsoft technologies and initiatives within the academic community, organizing events, workshops, and seminars to enhance technological literacy and foster collaboration
tasks.second: Key member and MSP of the year of the development group, focused on the development of various .NET-oriented applications for internal use while providing assistance to Microsoft employees across different fields
tasks.third: Contributed to the full-stack development and maintenance of the program's website
